title: lycopodium plumosum var. penniforme
intro: Lycopodium plumosum var. penniforme is a variety of the Lycopodium plumosum plant, a species of club moss that belongs to the lycopodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Lycopodium plumosum var. penniforme include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to support the immune system. Lycopodium plumosum var. penniforme is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
